subcodes.title: Words to Will and Wendell Dodge, spoken on 1901-11-20
subcodes.first_line: The history of the prophets who came before Abraham is not known, but it is known of those who came after him.
subcodes.subjects: @progressive revelation; renewal of religion, @proclamation to kings; rulers; prominent individuals, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @martyrs and martyrdom, @Judas, @Saint Peter and Saint Paul
